_publications._publicationTitle: p21-Activated kinases are required for transformation in a cell-based model of neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: Cells expressing ΔBB became fusiform as compared to normal NIH-3T3 cells (Fig. 2A). Expression of the PID, but not the control PID LF, showed substantial restoration of normal morphology.
details: Cells expressing Merlin ΔBB became fusiform compared to normal NIH-3T3 cells, with PID expression showing substantial restoration of normal morphology
